title: Verify AGV Startup Readiness and Correct AGV Zone Balance
summary: Confirm before startup that there are nine AGVs without totes in the system, distributed as five under the north rack and four under the south rack. If a zone is missing an AGV, move an AGV without a tote into the missing zone and add that AGV to RMS after the move.
when_to_use: Use before starting the AGV system to verify the required AGV-without-tote count and rack distribution, and when correcting a missing-AGV zone condition described by the source.
not_for: Do not use as a complete AGV movement method; the source does not provide safe-motion controls or relocation steps.
Do not use as a complete RMS operating procedure; the source does not provide the RMS access path, fields, or confirmation indicators.
Do not use this runbook to infer unsupported screen indicators from the shut-down mode image beyond the source-backed AGV startup context.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Verify AGV count and distribution before startup, determine whether a zone is missing an AGV, coordinate or perform the AGV move if supported locally, and add the moved AGV to RMS.

safety_notes: This procedure is not support-safe based on the source packet because the source does not describe how to move an AGV safely.
Do not invent or apply unsupported safe-motion controls, movement methods, or system constraints when relocating an AGV.
Escalate if AGV relocation cannot be completed using approved local methods not documented in this source.
access_or_tools_needed: Ability to verify AGV count and location under the north rack and south rack
Access to move an AGV without a tote
Access to RMS to add the moved AGV
Optional reference to the "System in Shut-down Mode" screen

access_required: Access to AGV location/status information sufficient to verify count and rack distribution
Access to RMS to add the moved AGV
system_preconditions: Procedure is performed before starting the system
AGV readiness must be evaluated based on AGVs without totes in the system

visual_references.description: System screen reference associated with AGV system start-up and shut-down guidance on page 88.
Recovery-related screen showing an AGV-add workflow context that may support the RMS add step, though it is from a nearby recovery section rather than the startup section.
AGV API Controls screen reference that may help orient AGV-related HMI navigation, but does not directly document the startup count/distribution requirement.

steps.title: Count AGVs without totes in the system
steps.purpose: Verify the documented pre-start AGV readiness count.
steps.instruction: Before starting the system, count the AGVs without totes in the system and verify that there are nine AGVs without totes total.
steps.expected_result: Nine AGVs without totes are present in the system before startup.
steps.healthy_condition: The count is exactly nine AGVs without totes.
steps.failure_condition: The count is not nine AGVs without totes.

actions.label: Verify total AGV count without totes
actions.exact_action: Count AGVs without totes in the system and verify there are nine total before starting the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use only as a startup-context visual reference for the AGV system in shut-down mode; do not infer unsupported counts or indicators beyond the source-backed context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The total number of AGVs without totes is not nine.
AGV count cannot be verified from available system information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Before starting the system, make sure there are enough AGVs without totes in the system. There should be nine (9) AGVs without totes in the system: five (5) under the north rack and four (4) under the south rack.

steps.title: Verify north-rack and south-rack AGV distribution
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented zone balance required before startup.
steps.instruction: Verify that the nine AGVs without totes are distributed as five under the north rack and four under the south rack.
steps.expected_result: AGV distribution matches the documented startup requirement.
steps.healthy_condition: Five AGVs without totes are under the north rack and four are under the south rack.
steps.failure_condition: Either rack does not have the required number of AGVs without totes.

actions.label: Verify rack distribution
actions.exact_action: Verify the AGV distribution is five under the north rack and four under the south rack.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use as a startup/shut-down mode visual reference only where the source supports AGV-related rack-area context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The north rack does not have five AGVs without totes.
The south rack does not have four AGVs without totes.
The expected zone distribution cannot be achieved or verified.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Before starting the system, make sure there are enough AGVs without totes in the system. There should be nine (9) AGVs without totes in the system: five (5) under the north rack and four (4) under the south rack.

steps.title: Use the shut-down mode screen as an optional visual reference
steps.purpose: Provide source-backed visual support for the startup readiness check without over-interpreting the image.
steps.instruction: If using the associated shut-down mode screen as support, compare the visible AGV-related areas or indicators only to the extent supported by the source artifact and startup context.
steps.expected_result: The screen is used only as a contextual visual aid for the AGV startup readiness check.
steps.healthy_condition: The visual reference is used conservatively and only within the source-backed AGV startup/shut-down context.
steps.failure_condition: The screen is relied on for unsupported details, counts, controls, or indicators not documented in the source packet.

actions.label: Reference shut-down mode screen
actions.exact_action: Compare the visible AGV-related areas or indicators on the "System in Shut-down Mode" screen to the expected north-rack and south-rack distribution only where supported by the source artifact.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: System in Shut-down Mode screen associated with AGV startup guidance.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not provide enough supported detail to verify the AGV distribution.
Verification would require inferring unsupported indicators or controls from the image.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 5-1 in section 5.8.1 is a system screen titled 'System in Shut-down Mode' and is associated with AGV startup and shutdown guidance.

steps.title: Move an AGV without a tote into the missing zone
steps.purpose: Correct a missing-AGV zone condition before startup.
steps.instruction: If a zone is missing an AGV, move an AGV without a tote into the zone that is missing an AGV.
steps.expected_result: The missing zone has an AGV without a tote positioned in it.
steps.healthy_condition: An AGV without a tote has been moved into the zone that was missing an AGV.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV cannot be moved, the correct zone cannot be reached, or the move cannot be completed safely using approved local methods.

actions.label: Relocate AGV to missing zone
actions.exact_action: Move an AGV without a tote into the zone that is missing an AGV.

stop_or_escalate_if: Safe movement method details are required but not provided by the source.
The source-expected AGV count or zone distribution cannot be achieved.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the system is started without nine totes, an AGV without a tote will need to be moved into the zone that is missing an AGV. Make sure to add the AGV to the RMS after moving the AGV.

steps.title: Add the moved AGV to RMS
steps.purpose: Complete the documented corrective action after relocating the AGV.
steps.instruction: After moving the AGV, add the moved AGV to the RMS.
steps.expected_result: The moved AGV has been added to RMS.
steps.healthy_condition: RMS addition of the moved AGV is completed using approved local access and method.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV cannot be added to RMS or RMS confirmation cannot be obtained.

actions.label: Add moved AGV in RMS
actions.exact_action: Add the AGV to the RMS after moving the AGV.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Optional nearby recovery visual showing an AGV-add workflow context; use only as supporting context because the startup source text does not provide RMS path, fields, or confirmation indicators.
Optional AGV-related controls reference; do not treat as direct evidence for the specific RMS add path unless locally validated.

stop_or_escalate_if: The RMS access path, fields, or confirmation indicators are needed but not provided by the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: If the system is started without nine totes, an AGV without a tote will need to be moved into the zone that is missing an AGV. Make sure to add the AGV to the RMS after moving the AGV.
Screen associated with the fault recovery procedure for adding an AGV to a zone when there is no empty AGV available.

success_criteria: Before startup, there are nine AGVs without totes in the system.
The AGV distribution is five under the north rack and four under the south rack.
If an AGV was moved to correct a missing zone, that AGV has been added to RMS.
healthy_conditions: Nine AGVs without totes are present before startup.
Five AGVs without totes are under the north rack.
Four AGVs without totes are under the south rack.
Any relocated AGV has been added to RMS.
failure_conditions: The total AGV count without totes is not nine.
The north/south rack distribution does not match five/four.
A missing-AGV zone cannot be corrected.
The moved AGV cannot be added to RMS.
Required movement or RMS details are needed but not provided by the source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if AGV relocation or RMS addition cannot be completed.
Escalate if the source-expected AGV count or zone distribution cannot be achieved.
Escalate when safe-motion controls or movement method details are required, because they are not provided by this source.
Escalate when RMS access path, fields, or confirmation indicators are required, because they are not provided by this source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Startup/shut-down mode screen associated with AGV readiness guidance.
Nearby recovery screen that may provide contextual support for adding an AGV after relocation.
AGV-related controls reference for general orientation only.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Before starting the system, make sure there are enough AGVs without totes in the system. There should be nine (9) AGVs without totes in the system: five (5) under the north rack and four (4) under the south rack.
If the system is started without nine totes, an AGV without a tote will need to be moved into the zone that is missing an AGV. Make sure to add the AGV to the RMS after moving the AGV.

missing_details: The source does not provide the RMS access path, fields, or confirmation indicators for adding the moved AGV.
The source does not provide safe-motion controls or movement method details for relocating an AGV.
The source does not specify whether production must be stopped beyond the pre-start context.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this procedure.
The source text says "started without nine totes," but the surrounding startup requirement is framed as AGVs without totes; SME review should confirm intended wording.
